productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Pink Pooh Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton pink sleeveless blouseWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort Fitdisney's pink sleeveless blouse, with a light pink check bib, panel and a happy looking Pooh is bound to become your little princess' favourite wear. Team this with denim shorts or jeans and take her out for a romp in the park.
